parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...item, output_text: 'not valid json', memory_extractor_debug: 'invalid_json' } }];

parameters.query:
WITH input_rows AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM jsonb_to_recordset($1::jsonb) AS x(
    scope TEXT,
    memory_type TEXT,
    conversation_id UUID,
    task_run_id UUID,
    source_message_id UUID,
    title TEXT,
    summary TEXT,
    details_json JSONB,
    importance SMALLINT,
    status TEXT
  )
), validated AS (
  SELECT
    gen_random_uuid() AS id,
    scope,
    memory_type,
    conversation_id,
    task_run_id,
    source_message_id,
    NULLIF(title, '') AS title,
    summary,
    COALESCE(details_json, '{}'::jsonb) AS details_json,
    GREATEST(1, LEAST(5, COALESCE(importance, 3)))::smallint AS importance,
    COALESCE(status, 'active') AS status
  FROM input_rows
  WHERE scope IN ('global', 'conversation', 'task')
    AND memory_type IN ('task_summary', 'decision', 'environment_fact', 'operational_note', 'conversation_summary')
    AND COALESCE(status, 'active') IN ('active', 'superseded', 'archived')
    AND NULLIF(summary, '') IS NOT NULL
), inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO ghost_memory (
    id,
    scope,
    memory_type,
    conversation_id,
    task_run_id,
    source_message_id,
    title,
    summary,
    details_json,
    importance,
    status
  )
  SELECT
    id,
    scope,
    memory_type,
    conversation_id,
    task_run_id,
    source_message_id,
    title,
    summary,
    details_json,
    importance,
    status
  FROM validated
  RETURNING id, scope, memory_type, conversation_id, summary, details_json, created_at
), superseded AS (
  UPDATE ghost_memory older
  SET status = 'superseded', updated_at = NOW()
  FROM inserted newer
  WHERE older.id <> newer.id
    AND older.status = 'active'
    AND older.memory_type = newer.memory_type
    AND older.scope = newer.scope
    AND older.memory_type IN ('decision', 'environment_fact', 'operational_note')
    AND COALESCE(older.conversation_id, '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000'::uuid) = COALESCE(newer.conversation_id, '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000'::uuid)
    AND (
      (
        COALESCE(NULLIF(newer.details_json->>'topic_key', ''), '') <> ''
        AND NULLIF(older.details_json->>'topic_key', '') = NULLIF(newer.details_json->>'topic_key', '')
      )
      OR lower(older.summary) = lower(newer.summary)
    )
  RETURNING older.id
)
SELECT
  inserted.id,
  inserted.scope,
  inserted.memory_type,
  inserted.summary,
  inserted.created_at,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superseded) AS superseded_count
FROM inserted;
